title: SOPHIAS eye-tracker IMU-data schema
description: Schema for the inertial measurement unit data stream recorded with Tobii Pro Glasses 3. The file is stored as JSON Lines, with one IMU sample per line. Each sample includes a relative eye-tracker timestamp in milliseconds from the start of the recording and three-axis accelerometer and gyroscope measurements.

type.description: Type of eye-tracking record. For IMU samples, this field identifies the entry as an inertial measurement record.

timestamp.description: Eye-tracker timestamp associated with the IMU sample, expressed in milliseconds from the start of the eye-tracker recording. This relative timestamp can be used to align IMU samples within the eye-tracking stream and, together with recording metadata or synchronization procedures, with other SOPHIAS modalities.
timestamp.unit: milliseconds from start of eye-tracker recording

data.description: Container for the inertial measurements recorded for this sample.

accelerometer.description: Three-axis linear acceleration measured by the Tobii Pro Glasses 3 inertial sensor. The array contains the acceleration values along the x, y, and z axes.

gyroscope.description: Three-axis angular velocity measured by the Tobii Pro Glasses 3 inertial sensor. The array contains the gyroscope values around the x, y, and z axes.
